title: Cobblemon Color Addition
description: Cobblemon Color Addition is a mod that adds more variations to Cobblemon blocks.
body:
# README

Cobblemon Color Addition is a mod that adds more variations to Cobblemon blocks.

- PCs
- Healing Machines
- Data Monitors
